name: Xal'thuun
title: Dream-Seeker
abilityWindow: During the "Movement" step of any players tactical action:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to allow that player to choose 1 non-home system that contains an anomaly. That player ignores any movement effects of that anomaly in that system during this tactical action.

name: Thul'morah
title: The Awakened One
abilityWindow: When you cast votes on an agenda:
abilityText: Cast an additional number of votes equal to the number of planets in systems that contain 1 or more of your nexus tokens.
unlockCondition: Have all 3 of your nexus tokens on the game board.

name: Shuulgoroth
title: The Nightmare Made Flesh
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Place or move up to 3 of your nexus tokens into any non-home system other than the Mecatol Rex system. Then, you may place your flagship and up to 3 destroyers in any system that contains a planet you control. If that system contains another player's ships, resolve combat. Then, purge this card.

name: Shardwright Veyla
title: Fleet Control
abilityWindow: At the end of a player's turn:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to allow that player to place a number of fighters from their reinforcements in the active system up to the number of non-fighter ships in that system. If that player was another player, gain trade goods equal to half of the amount of fighters placed rounded down.

name: Highbearer Lumina
title: Lightkeeper
abilityWindow: When you activate a system that contains another player's ships:
abilityText: For each ship being moved, you may choose to add +1 to that ships printed capacity value until the end of this tactical action.
unlockCondition: Have ships with a printed capacity value in 3 non-home systems.

name: Facet
title: Hive Mind Nexus
abilityWindow: At the start of a space combat:
abilityText: Place non-fighter ships in the active system from your reinforcements equal to the amount and type of each of your opponent's non-fighter ships participating in this combat. During this combat, your ships in the active system do not count against your fleet limit. At the end of combat, purge this card.

name: Orrun
title: Ash-Tender
abilityWindow: When a player's ship would be destroyed during combat:
abilityText: You may exhaus this card to allow that player to remove that unit from the game board and place it in a different system that contains at least 1 of their ships and 1 of their command tokens.

name: Karos
title: Ember-Guide
abilityWindow: When you gain or research a unit upgrade technology:
abilityText:
Place 1 of the corresponding unit from your reinforcements into a system that contains a planet you control and no other player's ships. 

When you use BOMBARDMENT: 

For each hit, you may either gain 1 commodity, or convert 1 of your commodities to a trade good.
unlockCondition: Use your Beauty in Destruction faction ability.

name: Asera
title: Flame-Warden
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Choose a system that contains 1 or more of your ships. Use each of your unit's BOMBARDMENT abilities in that system against each planet controlled by other players in and adjacent to that system. Then, purge this card.

name: Shipwright Kastel
title: Master of Defense
abilityWindow: When a non-combat game effect would instruct a player to remove or destroy one of their units:
abilityText: You may instead exhaust this card.

name: Captain Vakros
title: Fleetmaster
abilityWindow: During each combat round:
abilityText: You may reroll your mech's combat dice.
unlockCondition: Win a combat in which one of your mechs participated.

name: Admiral Thalen
title: Ironborn
abilityWindow: After moving 1 or more mechs and no other ships into the active system:
abilityText: You may immediately commit each of your mechs in the active system to any number of planets in that system and resolve ground combat, if able. Then, purge this card.

name: Len
title: Appraiser
abilityWindow: When a player would exhaust a planet to cast votes during the agenda phase:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to double that planet's influence value.

name: Zul
title: Grand Architect
abilityWindow: When you explore a planet:
abilityText: Gain 1 trade good. If the explored planet has an attachment, gain 1 additional trade good.

name: Zat
title: Architect Savant
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Attach the Grand Design card to a planet in your home system. Explore and ready each planet with a design attached to it. Then, purge this card.

name: Overclock
title: Production Specialist
abilityWindow: When any player's unit uses PRODUCTION:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to allow that player to choose 1 planet controlled by another player in a system adjacent to that unit. Reduce the combined cost of the produced units by that planet's resource value.

name: Seize
title: Sabateur
abilityWindow: During "Space Cannon Offense":
abilityText: You may treat 1 of each player's PDS on the game board whose control token is on your faction sheet as if you controlled it.
unlockCondition: Have 4 of your PDS units on the game board.

name: Revolution
title: The People's Voice
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Each player with a control token on your faction sheet must choose and destroy 1 structure they own on a non-home planet. Place 2 infantry from your reinforcements on each structure's planet that was destroyed in this way, and resolve ground combat, if able. Then, purge this card.

name: Serael
title: The Interperator
abilityWindow: At any time:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to allow a player to resolve the exhaust effect of 1 doctrine in your reinforcements.

name: Kaethos
title: The Unyielding
abilityWindow: When any player scores a secret objective:
abilityText: You may draw 1 secret objective, or gain 1 command token.
unlockCondition: Have all of your doctrines in your play area exhausted.

name: Naethu
title: The First Voice
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Place this card and all of your doctrines in your play area. During this action phase, when you exhaust one of your doctrines, ready 1 other doctrine. At the end of the status phase, return all but 2 of your doctrines to your reinforcements and purge this card.
